caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" and "HUSTLE" text, and a watch on his left wrist sits in a studio setting. He is wearing headphones and speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring multiple "UNIQUE HUSTLE" logos with five gold stars. A sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right sits a black container with red and white text that says "TALK OUT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. His expression shifts from a slight smile to a more serious look, and he brings his hands together in front of him in a clasping motion. The camera angle remains static, focusing on the man from the waist up.
